summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CaseFlow multi-tenant Case Management SaaS. All major features tested successfully including authentication, dashboard, client management, calendar, AI copilot, admin settings, and payments.

fixed_issues.issue: Returned 200 instead of 201 for client creation
500 Internal Server Error due to ObjectId serialization
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Added serialize_doc() calls to properly handle ObjectId conversion

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@caseflow.io / admin123)
Dashboard page loads with stat cards and charts
Navigation sidebar shows all links for ADMIN role
Client detail page with service logs, outcomes, follow-ups tabs
Calendar page with visit scheduling capability
AI Copilot panel opens and shows mock responses
Admin settings with Users, Invites, Vocabulary, Field Sets tabs
Payments page with pricing cards and subscription buttons
API health check returns healthy status
Backend API: POST /api/auth/login works with admin credentials
Backend API: POST /api/clients creates clients successfully
Backend API: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns correct stats
Backend API: POST /api/ai/copilot responds with mock AI responses
Backend API: GET /api/admin/vocabulary returns vocabulary config
Backend API: GET /api/admin/users returns user list
Backend API: GET /api/visits returns visits list
All CRUD operations for clients working correctly
